description: Store footer configuration - contact info, social links, locations, working hours

endpoints.name: Get Footer Settings

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Loads footer data into admin form for editing. Also used by storefront footer component to display contact info and links.

body.description: Additional fields like email, about text, etc.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Storefront footer: phone numbers as clickable links, WhatsApp chat button, social media icon links, location text, working hours. Admin: form fields pre-filled with current values.

endpoints.name: Save Footer Settings
endpoints.description: Update the entire footer configuration (full replace)

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin saves the footer settings form. Replaces all footer data with new values.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, footer preview updates if available

endpoints.name: Reset Footer Settings
endpoints.description: Reset footer settings to default values

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin clicks 'Reset to Defaults' button. Restores original default footer data.
frontendUsage.mockStatus: USE_MOCK=true - resets to imported footerData default

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows confirmation dialog, then success toast, form fields reset to default values
